name: Autograph
description: The autograph you got from the Vermilion City Gym Leader, Lt. Surge. He wrote, “Good luck!”

name: Clothing Trunk
description: A very light trunk that can carry clothing for you and your Pokémon.

name: Silver Razz Berry
description: A Berry that makes it easier to catch Pokémon when given to them.

name: Golden Razz Berry
description: A Berry that makes it drastically easier to catch Pokémon when given to them.

name: Silver Nanab Berry
description: A Berry that calms wild Pokémon you’re trying to catch when given to them.

name: Golden Nanab Berry
description: A Berry that calms wild Pokémon you’re trying to catch drastically when given to them.

name: Silver Pinap Berry
description: A Berry that makes you more likely to get an item when given to Pokémon you’re trying to catch.

name: Golden Pinap Berry
description: A Berry that makes you drastically more likely to get an item when given to Pokémon you’re trying to catch.

name: Secret Key
description: The key that unlocks the front door of the Pokémon Gym on Cinnabar Island. It has a red decoration.

name: S.S. Ticket
description: The ticket required to board the S.S. Anne. It has a drawing of a ship on it.

name: Parcel
description: A parcel to be delivered to Professor Oak from Viridian City’s Poké Mart.

name: Card Key
description: A card key that unlocks doors in Silph Co.’s head office in Saffron City.

name: Stretchy Spring
description: A thin small spring. It’s totally stretched out, and what it’s used for is unknown.

name: Chalky Stone
description: A small whitish stone picked up at the edge of the road.

name: Marble
description: A round glass marble. You can see colored glass inside the transparent marble.

name: Lone Earring
description: A single earring that somebody dropped.

name: Beach Glass
description: A piece of colored glass. Waves have rounded its edges. It’s slightly rough to the touch.

name: Gold Leaf
description: A mysterious gold leaf. No trees with this leaf have been found yet.

name: Silver Leaf
description: A mysterious silver leaf. No trees with this leaf have been found yet.

name: Polished Mud Ball
description: A ball made of mud. It had been polished for such a long time that the surface is very shiny.

name: Tropical Shell
description: A beautiful white shell that may have drifted from a sea in a warm region.

name: Leaf Letter
description: A letter written on a leaf. Something is written using Pikachu’s footprints.

name: Leaf Letter
description: A letter written on a leaf. Something is written using Eevee’s footprints.

name: Small Bouquet
description: A small bouquet that was made with heart and soul for a single Trainer.

name: Lure
description: A glass bottle of perfume that makes rare Pokémon more likely to appear.

name: Super Lure
description: A glass bottle of perfume that makes rare Pokémon more likely to appear. It lasts longer than a Lure.

name: Max Lure
description: A glass bottle of perfume that makes rare Pokémon more likely to appear. It lasts longer than a Super Lure.

name: Pewter Crunchies
description: Pewter City’s famous crunchy snack. They can be used to heal all status conditions of a single Pokémon.

name: Endorsement
description: A letter of recommendation that you’ll need in order to participate in the Gym Challenge.

name: Pokémon Box Link
description: A device that allows you to access the Pokémon storage system. There are some places where it won’t work.

name: Wishing Star
description: A stone found in the Galar region with a mysterious power. It’s said that your dreams come true if you find one.

name: Dynamax Band
description: A Wishing Star has been affixed to it. It lets out a light that allows Pokémon to Dynamax when at a Power Spot.

name: Fishing Rod
description: Use it by the water to fish up various kinds of Pokémon.

name: Rotom Bike
description: This bike can be combined with the Pokémon Rotom to use a turbo boost.

name: Sausages
description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. These sausages should be boiled before eating.

name: Bob’s Food Tin
description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. The tinned food that Bob sells is curiously popular in Galar.

name: Bach’s Food Tin
description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. The tinned food that Bach sells is curiously popular in Galar.

name: Tin of Beans
description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. When simmered, the beans suffuse a dish with their mild flavor.

name: Bread
description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. An indispensable tool for mopping up that extra curry left on your plate.

name: Pasta
description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. These flour noodles make for a surprisingly good match with curry.

name: Mixed Mushrooms
description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. The chewy texture of the mushrooms transforms any dish they’re added to.

name: Smoke-Poke Tail
description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. When a Slowpoke’s tail falls off, it grows back quickly.

name: Large Leek
description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. Whether this is the kind of vegetable stalk that Farfetch’d like is unknown.

name: Fancy Apple
description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. An apple chosen above others. It has spectacular form and a brilliant sheen.

name: Brittle Bones
description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. The taste boiled off from the bones is sure to give a dish a light umami taste.

name: Pack of Potatoes
description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. Potatoes help mellow out a spicy taste, to make a dish more mild.

name: Pungent Root
description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. Though carelessly picked, these herbs can add a fragrant accent to a dish.

name: Salad Mix
description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. The assortment of vegetables looks quite appealing and healthy.

name: Fried Food
description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. It’s been a while since it was fried, so it’s gotten greasy.

name: Boiled Egg
description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. Even just one boiled egg can really enhance a dish.

name: Camping Gear
description: Everything you need to set up a tent and get cooking in a Wild Area or at a camping spot.

name: Rusted Sword
description: It is said that a hero used this sword to halt a terrible disaster in ancient times. But it’s grown rusty and worn.

name: Rusted Shield
description: It is said that a hero used this shield to halt a terrible disaster in ancient times. But it’s grown rusty and worn.

name: Fossilized Bird
description: The fossil of an ancient Pokémon that once soared through the sky. What it looked like is a mystery.

name: Fossilized Fish
description: The fossil of an ancient Pokémon that once lived in the sea. What it looked like is a mystery.

name: Fossilized Drake
description: The fossil of an ancient Pokémon that once roamed the land. What it looked like is a mystery.

name: Fossilized Dino
description: The fossil of an ancient Pokémon that once lived in the sea. What it looked like is a mystery.

name: Strawberry Sweet
description: A strawberry-shaped sweet. When a Milcery holds this, it will spin around happily.

name: Love Sweet
description: A heart-shaped sweet. When a Milcery holds this, it spins around happily.

name: Berry Sweet
description: A berry-shaped sweet. When a Milcery holds this, it spins around happily.

name: Clover Sweet
description: A clover-shaped sweet. When a Milcery holds this, it spins around happily.

name: Flower Sweet
description: A flower-shaped sweet. When a Milcery holds this, it spins around happily.

name: Star Sweet
description: A star-shaped sweet. When a Milcery holds this, it spins around happily.

name: Ribbon Sweet
description: A ribbon-shaped sweet. When a Milcery holds this, it spins around happily.

name: Sweet Apple
description: A peculiar apple that can make a certain species of Pokémon evolve. It’s exceptionally sweet.

name: Tart Apple
description: A peculiar apple that can make a certain species of Pokémon evolve. It’s exceptionally tart.

name: Throat Spray
description: Raises Sp. Atk when a Pokémon uses a sound-based move.

name: Eject Pack
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. When the holder’s stats are lowered, it will be switched out of battle.

name: Heavy-Duty Boots
description: These boots prevent the effects of traps set on the battlefield.

name: Blunder Policy
description: Raises Speed sharply when a Pokémon misses with a move because of accuracy.

name: Room Service
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. Lowers Speed when Trick Room takes effect.

name: Utility Umbrella
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This sturdy umbrella protects the holder from the effects of rain and harsh sunlight.

name: Exp. Candy XS
description: A candy that is packed with energy. When consumed, it will grant a single Pokémon a very small amount of Exp. Points.

name: Exp. Candy S
description: A candy that is packed with energy. When consumed, it will grant a single Pokémon a small amount of Exp. Points.

name: Exp. Candy M
description: A candy that is packed with energy. When consumed, it will grant a single Pokémon a moderate amount of Exp. Points.

name: Exp. Candy L
description: A candy that is packed with energy. When consumed, it will grant a single Pokémon a large amount of Exp. Points.

name: Exp. Candy XL
description: A candy that is packed with energy. When consumed, it will grant a single Pokémon a very large amount of Exp. Points.

name: Dynamax Candy
description: A candy that is packed with energy. When consumed, it will raise the Dynamax Level of a single Pokémon by one. A higher level means higher HP when Dynamaxed.

name: TR00
description: A frenetic dance to uplift the fighting spirit. This sharply raises the user’s Attack stat.

name: TR01
description: The user drops onto the target with its full body weight. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

name: TR02
description: The target is scorched with an intense blast of fire. This may also leave the target with a burn.

name: TR03
description: The target is blasted by a huge volume of water launched under great pressure.

name: TR04
description: The user attacks everything around it by swamping its surroundings with a giant wave.

name: TR05
description: The target is struck with an icy-cold beam of energy. This may also leave the target frozen.

name: TR06
description: A howling blizzard is summoned to strike opposing Pokémon. This may also leave the opposing Pokémon frozen.

name: TR07
description: A powerful low kick that makes the target fall over. The heavier the target, the greater the move’s power.

name: TR08
description: A strong electric blast crashes down on the target. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

name: TR09
description: A wicked thunderbolt is dropped on the target to inflict damage. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

name: TR10
description: The user sets off an earthquake that strikes every Pokémon around it.

name: TR11
description: The target is hit by a strong telekinetic force. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.

name: TR12
description: The user relaxes and lightens its body to move faster. This sharply raises the Speed stat.

name: TR13
description: The user takes a deep breath and focuses so that critical hits land more easily.

name: TR14
description: The user waggles a finger and stimulates its brain into randomly using nearly any move.

name: TR15
description: The target is attacked with an intense blast of all-consuming fire. This may also leave the target with a burn.

name: TR16
description: The user charges at the target and may make it flinch.

name: TR17
description: The user temporarily empties its mind to forget its concerns. This sharply raises the user’s Sp. Def stat.

name: TR18
description: The user drains the target’s blood. The user’s HP is restored by half the damage taken by the target.

name: TR19
description: The user strikes with a simultaneous three-beam attack. This may also burn, freeze, or paralyze the target.

name: TR20
description: The user creates a substitute for itself using some of its HP. The substitute serves as the user’s decoy.

name: TR21
description: An all-out attack that becomes more powerful the less HP the user has.

name: TR22
description: Unsanitary sludge is hurled at the target. This may also poison the target.

name: TR23
description: The user lays a trap of spikes at the opposing team’s feet. The trap hurts Pokémon that switch into battle.

name: TR24
description: The user rampages and attacks for two to three turns. The user then becomes confused.

name: TR25
description: The user materializes an odd psychic wave to attack the target. This attack does physical damage.

name: TR26
description: The user endures any attack with at least 1 HP. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

name: TR27
description: While it is asleep, the user randomly uses one of the moves it knows.

name: TR28
description: Using its tough and impressive horn, the user rams into the target with no letup.

name: TR29
description: The user switches places with a party Pokémon in waiting and passes along any stat changes.

name: TR30
description: The user compels the target to keep using the move it encored for three turns.

name: TR31
description: The target is slammed with a steel-hard tail. This may also lower the target’s Defense stat.

name: TR32
description: The user crunches up the target with sharp fangs. This may also lower the target’s Defense stat.

name: TR33
description: The user hurls a shadowy blob at the target. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.

name: TR34
description: Two turns after this move is used, a hunk of psychic energy attacks the target.

name: TR35
description: The user attacks in an uproar for three turns. During that time, no Pokémon can fall asleep.

name: TR36
description: The user attacks by exhaling hot breath on opposing Pokémon. This may also leave those Pokémon with a burn.

name: TR37
description: The target is taunted into a rage that allows it to use only attack moves for three turns.

name: TR38
description: The user catches the target off guard and swaps its held item with its own.

name: TR39
description: The user attacks the target with great power. However, this also lowers the user’s Attack and Defense stats.

name: TR40
description: The user employs its psychic power to exchange Abilities with the target.

name: TR41
description: The user launches a kick that lands a critical hit more easily. This may also leave the target with a burn.

name: TR42
description: The user lets loose a horribly echoing shout with the power to inflict damage.

name: TR43
description: The user attacks the target at full power. The attack’s recoil harshly lowers the user’s Sp. Atk stat.

name: TR44
description: The user absorbs a mystical power from space to raise its Defense and Sp. Def stats.

name: TR45
description: The user attacks by shooting muddy water at opposing Pokémon. This may also lower their accuracy.

name: TR46
description: The user hardens its body’s surface like iron, sharply raising its Defense stat.

name: TR47
description: The user slashes the target with huge sharp claws.

name: TR48
description: The user tenses its muscles to bulk up its body, raising both its Attack and Defense stats.

name: TR49
description: The user quietly focuses its mind and calms its spirit to raise its Sp. Atk and Sp. Def stats.

name: TR50
description: The user handles a sharp leaf like a sword and attacks by cutting its target. Critical hits land more easily.

name: TR51
description: The user vigorously performs a mystic, powerful dance that raises its Attack and Speed stats.

name: TR52
description: The user tackles the target with a high-speed spin. The slower the user compared to the target, the greater the move’s power.

name: TR53
description: The user fights the target up close without guarding itself. This also lowers the user’s Defense and Sp. Def stats.

name: TR54
description: The user lays a trap of poison spikes at the feet of the opposing team. The spikes will poison opposing Pokémon that switch into battle.

name: TR55
description: The user cloaks itself in fire and charges the target. This also damages the user quite a lot. This attack may leave the target with a burn.

name: TR56
description: The user lets loose a blast of aura power from deep within its body at the target. This attack never misses.

name: TR57
description: The target is stabbed with a tentacle, arm, or the like steeped in poison. This may also poison the target.

name: TR58
description: The user releases a horrible aura imbued with dark thoughts. This may also make the target flinch.

name: TR59
description: The user slams a barrage of hard-shelled seeds down on the target from above.

name: TR60
description: The user slashes at the target by crossing its scythes or claws as if they were a pair of scissors.

name: TR61
description: The user generates a damaging sound wave by vibration. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.

name: TR62
description: The target is attacked with a shock wave generated by the user’s gaping mouth.

name: TR63
description: The user attacks with a ray of light that sparkles as if it were made of gemstones.

name: TR64
description: The user heightens its mental focus and unleashes its power. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.

name: TR65
description: The user draws power from nature and fires it at the target. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.

name: TR66
description: The user tucks in its wings and charges from a low altitude. This also damages the user quite a lot.

name: TR67
description: The user makes the ground under the target erupt with power. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.

name: TR68
description: The user stimulates its brain by thinking bad thoughts. This sharply raises the user’s Sp. Atk stat.

name: TR69
description: The user focuses its willpower to its head and attacks the target. This may also make the target flinch.

name: TR70
description: The user gathers all its light energy and releases it all at once. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.

name: TR71
description: The user whips up a storm of leaves around the target. The attack’s recoil harshly lowers the user’s Sp. Atk stat.

name: TR72
description: The user violently whirls its vines, tentacles, or the like to harshly lash the target.

name: TR73
description: The user shoots filthy garbage at the target to attack. This may also poison the target.

name: TR74
description: The user slams the target with its steel-hard head. This may also make the target flinch.

name: TR75
description: The user stabs the target from below with sharpened stones. Critical hits land more easily.

name: TR76
description: The user lays a trap of levitating stones around the opposing team. The trap hurts opposing Pokémon that switch into battle.

name: TR77
description: The user snares the target with grass and trips it. The heavier the target, the greater the move’s power.

name: TR78
description: The user strikes everything around it by swamping the area with a giant sludge wave. This may also poison those hit.

name: TR79
description: The user slams into the target with its heavy body. The more the user outweighs the target, the greater the move’s power.

name: TR80
description: The user hurls an electric orb at the target. The faster the user is than the target, the greater the move’s power.

name: TR81
description: The user turns the target’s power against it. The higher the target’s Attack stat, the greater the damage it deals.

name: TR82
description: The user attacks the target with stored power. The more the user’s stats are raised, the greater the move’s power.

name: TR83
description: The user teleports using a strange power and switches places with one of its allies.

name: TR84
description: The user shoots boiling hot water at its target. This may also leave the target with a burn.

name: TR85
description: The user is roused, and its Attack and Sp. Atk stats increase.

name: TR86
description: The user shrouds itself in electricity and smashes into its target. This also damages the user a little.

name: TR87
description: The user crashes into its target while rotating its body like a drill. Critical hits land more easily.

name: TR88
description: The user slams its target with its flame-covered body. The more the user outweighs the target, the greater the move’s power.

name: TR89
description: The user attacks by wrapping its opponent in a fierce wind that flies up into the sky. This may also confuse the target.

name: TR90
description: The user plays rough with the target and attacks it. This may also lower the target’s Attack stat.

name: TR91
description: Opposing Pokémon are drenched in an odd poisonous liquid. This lowers the Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats of a poisoned target.

name: TR92
description: The user damages opposing Pokémon by emitting a powerful flash.

name: TR93
description: The user swings both arms and hits the target. The target’s stat changes don’t affect this attack’s damage.

name: TR94
description: The user fiercely attacks the target using its entire body.

name: TR95
description: The user attacks the target’s throat, and the resultant suffering prevents the target from using moves that emit sound for two turns.

name: TR96
description: The user attacks the enemy with a pollen puff that explodes. If the target is an ally, it gives the ally a pollen puff that restores its HP instead.

name: TR97
description: The user bites the target with its psychic capabilities. This can also destroy Light Screen and Reflect.

name: TR98
description: The user slams into the target using a full-force blast of water. This may also lower the target’s Defense stat.

name: TR99
description: The user attacks by slamming its body into the target. The higher the user’s Defense, the more damage it can inflict on the target.

name: TM00
description: The target is slugged by a punch thrown with muscle-packed power.

name: Wishing Piece
description: Throw one into a Pokémon Den to attract a wild Dynamax Pokémon.

name: Cracked Pot
description: A peculiar teapot that can make a certain species of Pokémon evolve. It may be cracked, but tea poured from it is delicious.

name: Chipped Pot
description: A peculiar teapot that can make a certain species of Pokémon evolve. It may be chipped, but tea poured from it is delicious.

name: Hi-tech Earbuds
description: Strange earbuds that allow you to freely control the volume of various sounds.

name: Fruit Bunch
description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. The syrupy fruits give off a strong tropical feel.

name: Moomoo Cheese
description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. Melted cheese can really give a curry some richness.

name: Spice Mix
description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. There are over fifty spices contained within this ingredient’s hot flavor.

name: Fresh Cream
description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. Add some whipped cream to a spicy curry to give it some sweetness.

name: Packaged Curry
description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. Using packaged curry helps make sure there are no slipups when cooking.

name: Coconut Milk
description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. The refined sweetness of this coconut milk makes it quite popular.

name: Instant Noodles
description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. It has a junk-food sort of taste, but it goes well with curry.

name: Precooked Burger
description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. If you’re unsure about what to cook, you can’t go wrong with some burger.

name: Gigantamix
description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. A mysterious spice. Even a tiny sprinkle is sure to make a curry gigantic.

name: Wishing Chip
description: Toss a number of them into a Pokémon Den for the chance to attract a wild Dynamax Pokémon.

name: Rotom Bike
description: This bike can be combined with the Pokémon Rotom to not only do a turbo boost but also run on the water.

name: Catching Charm
description: Holding it is said to increase the chance of getting a critical catch. Curiously, the charm doesn’t shake much.

name: Old Letter
description: A letter entrusted to you by a girl, to be delivered to a boy. Strangely, it looks old to you.

name: Band Autograph
description: It’s signed by all members of the Galar region’s most charismatic band, the Maximizers.

name: Sonia’s Book
description: Professor Sonia’s published writings. Her new discoveries about the Galar region’s legends are recorded in this enjoyable read.

name: Rotom Catalog
description: A catalog of devices that Rotom like. Use the catalog to have Rotom hop in and out of the various devices listed within.

name: Max Honey
description: Honey that Dynamax Vespiquen produces. Adding this honey to Max Soup makes the taste very smooth. It also has the same effect as a Max Revive.

name: Max Mushrooms
description: Mushrooms that have the power of changing Dynamax forms. They boost all stats of a Pokémon during battle.

name: Galarica Twig
description: A twig from a species of tree called Galarica that grows in certain areas around the Galar region. It’s a material for an accessory for a certain Pokémon.

name: Galarica Cuff
description: A cuff made from woven-together Galarica Twigs. Giving it to Galarian Slowpoke makes the Pokémon very happy.

name: Style Card
description: A card that increases the selection in boutiques and hair salons.

name: Armor Pass
description: A pass to go to the Isle of Armor. Show it to the rail staff at Wedgehurst Station.

name: Rotom Bike
description: This bike can do a turbo boost and run on the water using Rotom’s power. It’s a sparkling white that shines brilliantly.

name: Rotom Bike
description: This bike can do a turbo boost and run on the water using Rotom’s power. It’s a glistening black that shines reddish-black.

name: Exp. Charm
description: A charm that increases the Exp. Points that Pokémon can get. A machine-like object is inside the charm.

name: Armorite Ore
description: Rare ore that can be obtained on the Isle of Armor. Something good will happen if you give it to a collector on the Isle of Armor.

name: Mark Charm
description: A mysterious and unique charm that increases the chance of finding a Pokémon with a mark.

name: Reins of Unity
description: Reins that people presented to the king. They enhance Calyrex’s power over bountiful harvests and unite Calyrex with its beloved steed.

name: Reins of Unity
description: Reins that people presented to the king. They enable those who are connected to communicate with each other. The reins separate Calyrex and its beloved steed.

name: Galarica Wreath
description: A wreath made from woven-together Galarica Twigs. Placing it on the head of a Galarian Slowpoke makes the Pokémon very happy.

name: Legendary Clue 1
description: A clue about the King of Bountiful Harvests. It’s written by Peony, and an old photo is attached to it.

name: Legendary Clue 2
description: A clue about the legend of giants. It’s written by Peony and has unique drawings.

name: Legendary Clue 3
description: A clue about the legend of bird Pokémon. It’s written by Peony and has a unique drawing.

name: Legendary Clue?
description: A mysterious clue that Peony seems to have dropped. There’s a photo attached to it showing a shining hole opening above the Max Lair.

name: Crown Pass
description: A pass to go to the Crown Tundra. Show it to the rail staff at Wedgehurst Station.

name: Wooden Crown
description: A mysterious object made of wood. Part of it seems to be chipped. Maybe it’s meant to be part of something.

name: Radiant Petal
description: A single petal that the King of Bountiful Harvests gave you. It radiates faint light.

name: White Mane Hair
description: Mane hair that belonged to the King of Bountiful Harvests’ beloved steed, Glastrier. The hair is strong and very flexible.

name: Black Mane Hair
description: Mane hair that belonged to the King of Bountiful Harvests’ beloved steed, Spectrier. The hair is very smooth to the touch.

name: Iceroot Carrot
description: Produce that the King of Bountiful Harvests’ beloved steed likes to eat. It grew in a field covered in snow.

name: Shaderoot Carrot
description: Produce that the King of Bountiful Harvests’ beloved steed likes to eat. It grew in a gloomy field.

name: Dynite Ore
description: Mysterious ore that can be obtained in the Max Lair. Something good will happen if you give it to a collector in the Crown Tundra.

name: Carrot Seeds
description: Seeds to plant in a field. The kind of carrot you’ll get is determined by which field you plant the seeds in.

name: Ability Patch
description: A patch that allows a Pokémon with a regular Ability to have a rare Ability.

name: Reins of Unity
description: Cords that shine when you hold them up to the light. The people of old times presented these to the King of Bountiful Harvests to express their gratitude.

name: Linking Cord
description: Allows a Pokemon whose evolution is usually triggered by trading to evolve

name: Heavy Ball
description: Doesn't fly far, but is more effective if the Pokémon hasn't noticed the player.

name: Leaden Ball
description: Upgraded version of the Heavy Ball. Doesn't fly far, but is more effective if the Pokémon hasn't noticed the player.

name: Gigaton Ball
description: Upgraded version of the Leaden Ball. Doesn't fly far, but is more effective if the Pokémon hasn't noticed the player.

name: Feather Ball
description: Can be thrown further than a regular Poké Ball. Is more effective for catching Pokémon that fly high in the air.

name: Wing Ball
description: Can be thrown further than a Feather Ball. Is more effective for catching Pokémon that fly high in the air.

name: Jet Ball
description: Can be thrown further than a Wing Ball. Is more effective for catching Pokémon that fly high in the air.
